welcome_title: You are warmly welcome to our wedding!
location_body: The wedding takes place in the heart of Lund, Sweden. We'll begin with a ceremony in Kulturens trädgård, then walk together to Tegnérs matsalar to continue the celebration. It's about a three-minute walk between the two.
location_tip: Tip: As a wedding guest, you have free entry to Kulturen from 12:00 if you'd like to visit the museum before the ceremony.
dress_body: Come dressed in a way you feel comfortable in. Examples:
dress_avoid: Please avoid solid black or white dresses.
speeches_body1: Many of our friends and family are talented musicians and gifted speakers. The venue has a stage, and we warmly encourage speeches, music, and other performances.
speeches_body2: For speeches, please feel free to keep them fairly short so that we have time to listen to everyone who would like to speak. A maximum of five minutes is usually about right.
speeches_body3: If you'd like to speak or perform, let us know in the free-text field of the RSVP form. We're also tentatively planning an “open stage” hour where spontaneous performances can happen.
language_body: Our wedding will be international, with 4+ languages! We'll do our best to make everyone feel included throughout the day. That said, it's worth knowing that the ceremony will be held in Swedish.
gifts_body1: Your being there is what we wish for most, and it is more than enough.
gifts_body2: If you'd still like to give a gift, we'd be glad for something simple, something artistic, something consumable, or a contribution to our honeymoon to Italy.
rsvp_section_body: Please let us know whether you can join us by 3 February 2027. Use your personal QR code/URL to open the RSVP form at the bottom of the page.
contact_body: If you have any questions before the day, you're welcome to reach either of us.
rsvp_intro_one: Tell us who's coming. You can bring up to {max} guest{min_clause}.
rsvp_intro_other: Tell us who's coming. You can bring up to {max} guests{min_clause}.
thank_you_body: Your RSVP has been submitted. See you at the wedding!
